title: FinanSEAL Agentic RAG System
description: LangGraph implementation for financial co-pilot with document search and transaction lookup capabilities

nodes.label: START
nodes.description: Entry point for the agent workflow

nodes.label: Call Model
nodes.description: SEA-LION inference with prompt-guided tool calling system

details.model: SEA-LION via Hugging Face Inference API
details.output: AI response with potential tool calls
details.system_prompt: Multi-language financial co-pilot with tool access

available_tools.name: search_documents
available_tools.description: RAG-powered document search using Qdrant vector database
process: Convert query to embedding via ColNomic Embed
Return top 5 relevant document chunks with metadata

available_tools.name: lookup_transactions
available_tools.description: SQL-based transaction queries with natural language interface
process: Convert query to SQL using SEA-LION

edges.label: Initialize
edges.description: Agent receives user message and conversation context

edges.label: Tool Needed
edges.description: AI message contains tool calls requiring execution

edges.label: Final Response
edges.description: AI provides final response without tool usage

edges.label: Tool Results
edges.description: Tool execution results fed back to model for processing

messages.reducer: messagesReducer - appends new messages to history

shouldContinue.description: Conditional router determining next step based on AI response

tool_calling_mechanism.reason: SEA-LION doesn't have native function calling support
tool_calling_mechanism.system_prompt_excerpt:
Available tools:
- search_documents(query: string): Search financial documents
- lookup_transactions(filters: object): Find transactions

When you need to use a tool, respond with JSON:
{"tool": "tool_name", "parameters": {...}}
tool_calling_mechanism.parsing: Custom JSON parsing in executeTool node

convex_storage.purpose: Chat history, user preferences, financial records

document_ingestion: Text chunks embedded and stored in Qdrant

execution_flow_example.user_query: What expenses did I have last month for office supplies?

steps.action: SEA-LION receives query and determines tool needed

sub_steps: Convert 'expenses last month office supplies' to SQL using SEA-LION
Execute SQL query against Supabase transactions table
Format results with amounts, dates, vendors
steps.output: Found 3 transactions: Office Depot $45.67, Staples $23.45, Amazon $67.89

steps.action: SEA-LION processes tool results and generates final response
steps.output: I found 3 office supply expenses from last month totaling $137.01...

steps.action: Response delivered to user and saved to Supabase

security_considerations.authentication: Clerk user sessions validated in API routes
security_considerations.authorization: Supabase RLS policies restrict data access by user_id
security_considerations.input_validation: SQL injection prevention in text-to-SQL conversion
security_considerations.prompt_injection: System prompt boundaries and input sanitization
